title: Ways Weva Could Subvert Eva
wikitext:
[]: Ways Weva Could Subvert Eva             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue May 29, 2007 10:23 pm It's no secret that part of what made the original Evangelion so fresh is that it took several tropes that existed in shonen anime and subverted them in new ways. That said, I'm willing to bet that the new Eva movies will subvert tropes started by the old Eva for the same kind of surprise. These are purely conjectural, but here are some ideas I'd have for subverting the Old Century version. I don't expect any particular one of these to be in there, but I'm sure there will be similar sorts of things: -Rei dies... and doesn't come back -Kaji survives, but is actually loyal to Seele and betrays NERV -Shinji and Asuka actually engage in sexual congress -For a bonus, the suggestion to do so is put forth by Shinji You know, things of that sort that would shock long-time familiars of "Ãže Olde Eva". Feel free to add to the list of possibilities. And by that, I mean add to the list of possibilities or I'll break into your house at night and eat your dog.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue May 29, 2007 10:54 pm -Ritsuko becomes a more likeable character than Misato - Gendo takes Shinji out for ice cream -Rei shows shock when Shinji grabs her mammaries - Asuka is pleasant - The Angels speak in Spanish - Kaji is replaced by Kamina and the OMEGA - Kaworu masturbates over a comatose Shinji But Rei will never die!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue May 29, 2007 10:56 pm It makes sense.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue May 29, 2007 11:08 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: -Ritsuko becomes a more likeable character than Misato - Gendo takes Shinji out for ice cream -Rei shows shock when Shinji grabs her mammaries - Asuka is pleasant - The Angels speak in Spanish - Kaji is replaced by Kamina and the OMEGA

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue May 29, 2007 11:13 pm Mayo appears in the movie :roll: Alright enough mayo. Rei, will have sexual intercourse with Shinji when he touches her boob.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 29, 2007 11:21 pm Asuka x Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue May 29, 2007 11:29 pm *rubs hands* -Ritsuko tries to seduce Toji after failing with Gendo -Shinji isn't a clueless boy anymore -Toji gets his leg grown back -Hikari pilots a pink Chinese Eva Unit-08 -Ritsuko and Misato make out after they fail at other attempts hinted at in vague dialog -All pilots can drive cars. Except Kensuke, he'd rather fly a personal jet back and forth. -That last sentence is my next suggestion, but its so obvious that I cannot state it. It's against the law or something. -Kaji drives a Hummer in Japan. (rofl, j/k) -Gendo dies midway through the story. Fuyutsuki becomes Commander and Kaji becomes Vice Commander to save his own ass.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Wed May 30, 2007 12:15 am fem-Kaworu seduces Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed May 30, 2007 12:52 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Asuka x Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 30, 2007 1:06 am slothen wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Asuka x Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 30, 2007 1:39 pm Indeed it would. I also like the idea of Gendo's death. EDIT: For an extra sooper ultra bonus , Gendo dies while the song "1999" is playing in the background.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed May 30, 2007 2:10 pm Was this meant to be serious or has it already descended into a spamfest.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 30, 2007 7:11 pm Szmitten wrote: Was this meant to be serious or has it already descended into a spamfest.

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Wed May 30, 2007 11:36 pm - Mana shows up.. ... JUST KIDDING!

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Wed May 30, 2007 11:49 pm Bloopers at the end of the movie
